bug.description: copy-paste error where duplicated code was not correctly updated for its new context

prompt:
There is a copy-paste error where duplicated code was not correctly updated for its new context downstream of function _process_emm_msg in the openair3/NAS/TEST subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/TEST/NETWORK/network_simulator.c:647.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
